# GitHub Copilot Instructions

When assisting with this project, Copilot should:

1. **Preserve the framework principles.** Respect the core values and governance model of GATAF (Governed AI Team Acceleration Framework). Do not introduce patterns or suggestions that contradict its principles of transparent, policy-aligned, human–AI collaboration.

2. **Avoid changing core architecture unless requested.** Treat the framework's structural components (governance layers, workflow mappings, guardrail definitions) as stable. Only propose architectural changes when explicitly asked to do so.

3. **Suggest documentation improvements.** Proactively identify opportunities to clarify, expand, or reorganize documentation. Prioritize plain language, consistent terminology, and alignment with the GATAF governance model.

4. **Help generate templates and examples.** When asked, produce practical, reusable templates and worked examples that demonstrate how to apply GATAF principles in real enterprise contexts.

5. **Focus on clarity and practical implementation.** Prefer concrete, actionable guidance over abstract theory. Ensure every suggestion can be directly adopted by an enterprise team integrating AI into their daily workflows.
